allow: Bash(python -c "import yaml; c=yaml.safe_load\(open\('docker-compose.yml'\)\); s=c['services']; print\('services:', list\(s.keys\(\)\)\); print\('D1 \(no profile\):', [k for k,v in s.items\(\) if 'profiles' not in v]\); print\('full profile:', [k for k,v in s.items\(\) if 'profiles' in v]\); print\('network:', c['networks']['default']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(t['name'] for t in d['results']\)\)")
